index.html.title: Introduction
index.html.lead: OKLCH tokens, live component preview, npm or CDN quick start, and paths to customize or verify accessibility.

whats-new.html.title: What's new
whats-new.html.lead: Release highlights for PimentCSS v1.0: tokens, components, patterns, documentation, and migration from Piment-Css.

installation.html.title: Installation
installation.html.lead: Add PimentCSS via npm, CDN, or Sass compilation.

customization.html.title: Customization
customization.html.lead: Override Sass variables and CSS tokens to match your brand.

colors.html.title: Colors
colors.html.lead: OKLCH palettes with hex fallback, semantic variables, and swatch classes.

typography.html.title: Typography
typography.html.lead: Heading scale, body utilities, and font loading for Zodiak and Plus Jakarta Sans.

layout.html.title: Layout
layout.html.lead: Container, 12-column grid, spacing utilities, and RGAA-friendly layout patterns for light and dark mode.

buttons.html.title: Buttons
buttons.html.lead: Primary, outline, and transparent variants with icon slots and touch targets.

api.description: Base class — flex, typography, transitions, and touch min-height.

a11y: Use
Disabled state: disabled attribute or aria-disabled="true".
Visible focus uses .focus-visible and --focus-ring (3px).

input-fields.html.title: Input fields
input-fields.html.lead: Labels, hints, validation states, and prefix icons for text inputs.

a11y.html.title: Accessibility guide
a11y.html.lead: Focus rings, touch targets, semantic contrast pairs, and reduced motion.

theme-toggle.html.title: Theme toggle
theme-toggle.html.lead: Light / dark mode control for headers, menus, and settings panels.

icons.html.title: Icons
icons.html.lead: Dimensioned icon slots for any SVG or icon font. Phosphor is used in docs as a reference example only.

depth.html.title: Depth & shadows
depth.html.lead: Elevation shadows and z-index tokens for cards, overlays, and modals.

checkboxes-radios-switch.html.title: Checkboxes, radios & switches
checkboxes-radios-switch.html.lead: Selection controls with accessible labels and group semantics.
a11y: Wrap each control in <label> with a native <input> first.
Group radios with <fieldset> + <legend>.
Switches use role="switch" and aria-checked synced on change.
Checkbox error: .checkbox--error + aria-invalid="true".

form.html.title: Form
form.html.lead: Vertical form layout with fields, actions, and validation messaging.
a11y: Every control has a visible label linked with for / id.
Use aria-invalid and hint text for validation errors.
Submit uses type="submit" on a .btn--primary.

date-picker.html.title: Date picker
date-picker.html.lead: Calendar panel, month navigation, and field-group layout.

autocomplete.html.title: Autocomplete
autocomplete.html.lead: Suggest list, keyboard navigation, and combobox patterns.

button-group.html.title: Button group
button-group.html.lead: Segmented single-select and optional multi-toggle toolbars.

link-breadcrumb.html.title: Links & breadcrumb
link-breadcrumb.html.lead: Inline links, external trail icons, and breadcrumb navigation.

navigation.html.title: Navigation
navigation.html.lead: Header nav items, active state, and responsive shell patterns.

menu-dropdown.html.title: Menu & dropdown
menu-dropdown.html.lead: Menu lists, dropdown panels, and keyboard-friendly disclosure.

tabs.html.title: Tabs
tabs.html.lead: Tablist, panels, and arrow-key navigation between tabs.

pagination.html.title: Pagination
pagination.html.lead: Page controls, ellipsis, and compact table footers.

anchor-inpage-nav.html.title: In-page anchors
anchor-inpage-nav.html.lead: In-page anchor list with scroll-spy style active states.

carousel.html.title: Carousel
carousel.html.lead: Scrollable track, arrows, and scrollbar affordances.

table.html.title: Tables
table.html.lead: Semantic row tables with a horizontal scroll region, plus column stacks and mobile-friendly card patterns.

list.html.title: Lists
list.html.lead: Stacked list rows with indicators and optional actions.
a11y: Use <ol class="list__items"> for ordered steps; <ul> when order is not meaningful.
Mark decorative .list__indicator with aria-hidden="true" when the list order already conveys sequence.
Keep heading hierarchy: section .list__heading, then <h3 class="list__title"> per row.

tree.html.title: Tree
tree.html.lead: Expandable tree groups with toggle buttons and nested items.
a11y: Use role="tree" on the root, role="treeitem" on each <li>, and role="group" on child .tree__group lists.
Sync aria-expanded on toggles; hide collapsed groups with the hidden attribute.
Link toggles to groups via aria-controls and stable id on .tree__group.

badge.html.title: Badges
badge.html.lead: Dot badges, counts, and status labels on inline content.
a11y: Copy badges expose meaning through visible text; pair icon-only controls with an accessible name that includes the count.
Dot badges need role="img" and a concise aria-label; add visible status text nearby when color carries meaning.
Prefer updating a parent aria-live region when counts change, not the badge element alone.

tags.html.title: Tags
tags.html.lead: Removable tags, filter chips, and pressed toggle states.
a11y: Static tags use <span>; interactive filters use <button> with aria-pressed.
Group related filter chips with role="group" and an accessible name.
Mark decorative icons aria-hidden="true"; state must not rely on color alone.

keyline.html.title: Dividers
keyline.html.lead: Horizontal rules and vertical keylines for section separation.
a11y: Use <hr> for thematic breaks between sections of content.
Decorative <div class="keyline"> separators: role="separator" and aria-hidden="true" when structure is already clear.
Avoid stacking multiple adjacent dividers; one line per logical break.

placeholder.html.title: Placeholder
placeholder.html.lead: Copy blocks, media ratio placeholders, and skeleton patterns.
a11y: Use real heading levels with utility classes; do not skip levels for styling only.
Production images need meaningful alt; decorative placeholders use alt="".
When swapping placeholders for content, announce updates with aria-live where needed.

alerts.html.title: Alerts
alerts.html.lead: Inline alerts, dismiss controls, and dialog-style confirmations.
a11y: Use role="alert" for warnings and errors; role="status" for information and success.
Alert dialogs: role="alertdialog", aria-modal="true", labelled title and description.
Auto-dismiss must not replace a close button; icons are decorative.

modals.html.title: Modals
modals.html.lead: Modal overlay, focus trap, and action footers.
a11y: Use role="dialog" and aria-modal="true" with a visible title (aria-labelledby).
Trap focus inside the panel, restore focus to the trigger on close, and lock page scroll while open.
Reserve role="alertdialog" for urgent limited-choice prompts (see Alerts).

cards.html.title: Cards
cards.html.lead: Card patterns for Copy, Newsletter signup, Blank slots, media ratios, and elevated panels.
a11y: Use <article> for self-contained cards with a visible heading.
Decorative card images use alt=""; form fields need linked labels.
Primary actions need an accessible name independent of the card title.

modals-cards.html.title: Modals & cards (moved)
modals-cards.html.lead: This page was split into Modals and Cards. Use the links below.

snackbar.html.title: Snackbar
snackbar.html.lead: Transient snackbars with actions, auto-dismiss, and progress.
a11y: Use role="status" or role="alert" with matching aria-live for errors.
Provide .snackbar__close with an accessible name; do not trap focus in passive toasts.
Mount live toasts in a single viewport host with aria-relevant="additions".

progress.html.title: Progress
progress.html.lead: Linear bars, labeled progress, and circular indicators.
a11y: Use role="progressbar" with aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, and aria-valuemax when the value is known.
Pair unlabeled bars with aria-label; compound .progress-bar uses aria-labelledby on the visible label.
Prefer Loader when duration is unknown (indeterminate).

loader.html.title: Loader
a11y: Use role="status" with aria-label; add aria-live="polite" when the loader appears dynamically.
Set aria-busy="true" on the loading region; hide the loader with hidden when idle.
Mark each .loader__dot with aria-hidden="true".

patterns.html.title: Overview
patterns.html.lead: Short recipes that combine forms, feedback, navigation, and content components into real pages.

pattern-contact-form.html.title: Contact form
pattern-contact-form.html.lead: Contact form recipe with fields, consent, and submit actions.

pattern-toolbar-modal.html.title: Toolbar + modal
pattern-toolbar-modal.html.lead: Toolbar with status alert, button group, and modal task flow.

pattern-table-pagination.html.title: Table + pagination
pattern-table-pagination.html.lead: Data table with selection and pagination controls.

slots-layouts.html.title: Slots & layouts
slots-layouts.html.lead: Slot placeholders and column/row layout grids for wireframes.
a11y: Replace .slot placeholders with semantic content before production.
Use role="group" and aria-label on layouts when slots form one UI pattern.
Preserve DOM order matching visual reading order in column and row layouts.
